factors: The actions made by both of them and if those actions mattered to the decision making process of the farmer. If the farmer did not have any guesses and the wizard helped him to go to a certain treasure chest, then the wizard caused the farmer to do something. If the farmer had a guess and the wizard showed him to go to the same way, then the wizard helped him but not that much because the farmer already had some thought in his mind. His advice acted as a support to the farmer's decision.
